name: Alfond Youth Center
description: Alfond Youth Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Waterville, ME. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and wheelchair accessibility. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play.

name: Buker (outdoor)
description: Come play pickleball at Buker (outdoor) in Augusta, ME! There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Calumet Playground
description: Come play pickleball at Calumet Playground in Augusta, ME! There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Champion's Fitness Club
description: Come play pickleball at Champion's Fitness Club in Waterville, ME! There are 8 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include food, restrooms, lights, locker rooms, water, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons.

name: China Middle School
description: Come play pickleball at China Middle School in China, ME! There are 4 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Courts at Messalonskee
description: Come play pickleball at Courts at Messalonskee in Oakland, ME! There are 6 outdoor asphalt and acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Courts at Winslow High School
description: Courts at Winslow High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Winslow, ME. There are 4 outdoor asphalt and acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Kennebec Valley Tennis Association
description: Kennebec Valley Tennis Association is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Augusta, ME. There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Waterville North St. Courts
description: Waterville North St. Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Waterville, ME. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.
